# waggle_datacenters (Data Source)

Fetches a datacenters data source.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `created_at` (String)
- `has_token` (Boolean) Whether a Proxmox API token is configured (the token itself is never returned).
- `insecure_skip_verify` (Boolean) Whether TLS verification is disabled for this cluster (self-signed certs).
- `name` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `url` (String)

### Read-Only

- `__schema` (String) A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
